top_signals.title: Meyer Turku Donates Money for Professorship at Aalto University
top_signals.summary: Meyer Turku is investing in shipbuilders of the future by donating EUR 800,000 ($930,000) to Aalto University. With the donation, Aalto will establish a five-year Professor of Practice to accelerate developments in marine technology and secure…
